name: Amir Double Flail
description: The apparent unity of Jibey, Ahjat, and other realms of Jacinth is merely a mirage. In reality, each is a patchwork of diverse tribes, khanates, and emirates, with every local "monarch" wielding almost absolute power over their people.
descriptionZh: 吉贝、艾哈雅特与红锆的其他各国看似统一，实则只是假象。每个国家都是各种部族、汗国、埃米尔国拼凑而成，各自的“君主”掌握绝对的统治权力。
